audit_items.proof_trace: All free operations in t_hash.c are followed by either immediate pointer replacement or are guarded against re-use: the HASH_SET_TAKE_FIELD/TAKE_VALUE paths null the caller's pointer before the cleanup check (L254, L260, L245), the old HT value freed at L242 is immediately overwritten at L244/L247, the old ziplist freed at L492 is only freed after the iterator is released and all data is already copied into the new dict via sdsnewlen/sdsfromlonglong (no raw ziplist pointer escapes), and both callers of hashTypeReleaseIterator do not access hi after the call. No pointer is dereferenced after being freed and no double-free path exists.
